libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0 use Jackson 3 types from the tools.jackson namespace, e.g. import tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode; do not add or import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode for generated schema assertions. Exercise the module by creating a SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder, registering new Swagger2Module(), and generating schemas for classes annotated with @Schema/@ArraySchema.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 is used by registering Swagger2Module with SchemaGenerator; the module POM marks jsonschema-generator as provided, so it is not pulled transitively by the tested artifact.
The module derives schema attributes from io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations, and the artifact POM marks swagger-annotations as provided rather than transitive.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 test code using com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode will not compile against 5.0.0 because jsonschema-generator 5.0.0 returns Jackson 3 tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode.
Adding old Jackson 2 databind would not fix the real API mismatch and may create incompatible JsonNode assignments.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a VicTools add-on module with provided dependencies; meaningful tests need the main jsonschema-generator plus Swagger 2.x annotations on the test classpath.
